impact: This advances checkbox-22 by providing deterministic expected output for later lifecycle requirement extraction validation without live crawling, authenticated DevHub automation, or private artifacts.
summary: Add a redacted lifecycle requirement extraction expected-output fixture with exactly eight source-backed category records.
target_task: Task checkbox-22: Add a minimal lifecycle requirement extraction expected-output fixture with exactly eight category records: extension eligibility, reactivation eligibility, cancellation eligibility, refund eligibility, inspection scheduling, inspection-result follow-up, fee/payment checkpoints, and explicit-confirmation gates, all source-backed and redacted.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
